data.title: JPMorgan Crushes Q1 Earnings—But Dimon Says Economic Turbulence Is Coming
data.description:

data.title: Cryptocurrency Criminals Increasingly Evade Detection Across Blockchains
data.description:
According to PANews, cryptocurrency criminals are employing more sophisticated methods to evade detection by transferring assets across multiple blockchain ecosystems. Data from blockchain analysis firm Elliptic reveals that 20% of complex cross-chain investigations now involve more than ten different blockchains. Additionally, one-third of these investigations involve four or more blockchains, while 27% involve more than five.

Jackson Hull, Elliptic's Chief Technology Officer, noted a significant rise in cross-chain criminal activities over the past five years, attributed to reduced costs and increased options for cross-chain switching. While some individuals transfer assets across crypto ecosystems for non-criminal purposes, Hull emphasized that hackers and criminals frequently use this method to launder money and obscure their tracks.

Elliptic has recently expanded its coverage to support 50 blockchains, enabling investigators using Elliptic software to easily track funds transferred across any supported blockchain. The software also supports tracking through over 300 cross-chain bridges. Hull added that Elliptic can incorporate a new blockchain into its coverage within just three weeks.

data.title: Institutional crypto trading volume surged in the first quarter of Trump's administration, and stablecoin trading volume increased by 158% year-on-year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The report shows that in the first quarter of 2025, the volume of over-the-counter crypto transactions in the United States increased by 141% year-on-year, and the volume of stablecoin transactions soared by 158% year-on-year. Among them, the volume of crypto/stablecoin transactions increased five times compared with the same period in 2024, becoming the fastest growing sector. Bitcoin, Ethereum and stablecoins accounted for 95.3% of the total transaction volume, indicating that institutions are still cautious about altcoins. (The Block)

data.title: OpenZK Network Completes $6 Million Early Funding, Animoca Brands and Other Institutions Participate
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, OpenZK Network announced the completion of $6 million in early financing, with investors including Animoca Brands, Coinstore, Sovereign Trust and other institutions. This round of financing will be used to support its technology research and development and ecological construction.
It is reported that OpenZK was founded by Dave Sandor, former executive president of Goldman Sachs Asia Pacific, and is currently actively negotiating cooperation with many institutions to promote subsequent strategic layout.

data.title: U.S. April Inflation Rate Expectations Rise to 6.7%
data.description: According to Odaily, the initial estimate for the United States' one-year inflation rate in April is 6.7%. This figure surpasses the anticipated 5.1% and the previous value of 5.00%.

data.title: The initial forecast for the US one-year inflation rate in April was 6.7%, the expected rate was 5.1%, and the previous value was 5.00%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The initial value of the US one-year inflation rate in April is 6.7%, the expected value is 5.1%, and the previous value is 5.00%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Fed's Musallem: Fed should be wary of continued inflation driven by tariffs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Fed's Musallem said he is closely watching whether rising short-term inflation expectations will penetrate into long-term expectations, which could make it more difficult to fight inflation and reduce the Fed's flexibility to deal with a weak labor market. He pointed out that there is a high degree of uncertainty about the effects and timing of tariffs and other new policies, and there is a "clear possibility" that inflation will re-accelerate even if the job market weakens. He said that the Fed's policy is in a favorable position and should remain vigilant. "I am cautious about the assumption that the impact of increased tariffs on inflation is only temporary or limited," he said. "I think it is appropriate to "fend off" second-round effects through monetary policy, although in reality it may be a challenge to distinguish between potential inflation and the direct, indirect and second-round effects of tariffs." (Jinshi)

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 83,000 USDT with a 2.21% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 11, 2025, 13:39 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 83,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 83,010.890625 USDT, with a narrowed 2.21% increase in 24 hours.
